description: Preserved, dried, and stored foods good for travel and long keeping.
foods: Tough strips of dried meat that take forever to chew and taste like campfire smoke and salt.
Crunchy and sour and impossible to eat quietly, pulled dripping from a jar.
Thick and sweet and jewel-colored, spread on anything that holds still long enough.
Chewy and shriveled and sweeter than the fresh kind, perfect for pockets and long walks.
Golden and slow, stolen from bees who haven't forgiven anyone yet.
A wedge of something sharp and crumbly, wrapped in cloth and carried until the edges go soft.
Salt-cured and smoke-dried until it turns the color of dark wood, flaking apart in thin sheets.
Roasted and salted and eaten by the handful, the sound of crunching giving away anyone who tries to sneak them.
